root: ^While travelling, come across a small cave. You could swear you heard some strange noises too, but they seem to have stopped.
^A frog? But something's off. Frogs ribbit, yes, but they don't say "ribbit". Is this thing pretending to be a frog?
^"Come out! I know you're not a frog!"
^"How did you figure out I'm in this bush?"
^"Fair play, I suppose. I'll hop out."
^It does indeed hop out, launching some mushrooms out of the bush right alongside it. It drops a sword it was holding.
^"Whoops. Sorry about jumping out with a sword. Didn't think... how that might look."
^"You want a mushroom too? They make you feel reeeeeeeeeally nice."
^"I think those are poisonous for humans.

b: ^ Having to look for a new host would be troublesome.

root: ^"My name is Rudibert, if that's what you mean."
^"I meant the whole thing about being a huge purple frog."
^This isn't going anywhere. You'll have to do something about this.

s: ^The apple crunches pleasantly as you bite into it.
^While this would be a good opportunity to burn yourself to a crisp, you feel like you shouldn't mess around this time.
^You talk to yourself for a few moments, making observations on the fungus present in the cave.
^You ponder your lockpick for a moment. Good to have one of these, you think.
^Oh, your trusty staff. So dependable, yet you don't think using it at yourself would do anything.
^You consider the dagger in your hand, then you give it a few spins. Finally you flip it in the air and catch it. Nice.
^You feel the allure of your cast iron friend calling. Oh how wonderful it could be to feel it crack your skull open...
^You quickly swig down your healing potion, not stopping to think if you need it or not.
^"Why did I ever think I could be a wizard... I don't even have a proper spellbook anymore... I'm just such a loser..."
^You give the rope some thought. Maybe not the time or place to be tying yourself up.
^You examine your fists for a moment. Punching yourself isn't really your style.
^Try as you might, giving yourself a static shock proves to be impossible. Darn it.
^You peer into the bottle of poison. The liquid inside swirls menacingly. You... shouldn't drink this, right?
^You take out your can of soup. Time for a little meal!
^You form a snowball in your hands. And then... Hmm. You decide to give it a bite.
^You decide that it's best to make a quick exit, blasting smoke all around yourself!
^You decide to leg it! Rudibert clearly wasn't expecting you to run, so he's left confused as you head towards the cave entrance.
^You consider the stick in your hands. What a cool shape...
^You think for a moment, pondering how you could deceive yourself...
^You recite some healing words, and wait for the effect to kick in.

b: ^ Perhaps this will smooth things over?

s: ^Time to show this frog the might of your trusty staff!
^You give your dagger a few courtesy spins, and lunge at Rudibert!
^You heft your dear cast-iron friend in your hand, and prepare to attack!
^You take out a healing potion and offer it to Rudibert.
^You ready yourself for a moment, then hurl a punch directly at Rudibert!
^Your fingers spark with electricity as you ready a static shock.
^"Your hat doesn't suit you and you smell weird!"
^You swing the rope in your hands a few times, then skillfully fling it around Rudibert!
^A devious scheme brews in your mind, and you offer the bottle of poison to Rudibert.

b: ^Seeing as you're in a fight, you could use it for self-defense.
^Perhaps Rudibert would like some soup for a change?

s: ^You form a snowball in your hands and quickly fling it at Rudibert!
^A cloud of smoke puffs around Rudibert, and you bolt for the cave entrance!
^Time to show Rudibert the might of this cool stick!
^"Hey did you know that there's like a whole forest of those mushrooms a short walk south of the cave?"
^You recite some healing words, and wisps of energy start circling around Rudibert.

b: ^Rudibert is eyeing you as you eat. Is he... jealous?
^Despite having seemed mad at you just a few moments ago, Rudibert quickly gets too immersed in your speech to react.
^When you stop, he seems to realize that he should perhaps have taken the opportunity to attack you. Too late now!
^Rudibert seems very interested in your little narration, listening intently.
^Rudibert looks on in awe, his eyes struggling to follow the movements. He eventually manages to shake off his amazement.
^...do it. After all, you deserve some quality time with your favorite cooking instrument.
^You brush your finger over its textured surface, before firmly gripping the handle.
^Ohh yes. Ohhhh yesss... Blood starts streaming from your
^The pain is dull and hot, and your
^control over your host body feels a bit weaker
^He looks shellshocked. Like he just saw someone crack
^ skull open with a cast-iron pan.
^...not. Maybe you should not. As tempting as it is, you might need this for fighting. Or hell, maybe even cooking!
^You feel its healing effects kick in, restoring you considerably.
^You feel its healing effects kick in, restoring you slightly.
^And you don't. At least the potion itself is somewhat sweet.
^Thanks to your speed, Rudibert doesn't have an opportunity to strike you!
^As you finish your potion, Rudibert gives you an approving look.
^ prefers the drink instead. Fine choice.

c-8: ^Rudibert looks on as you're wallowing in self-loathing, seemingly considering what to do.

b: ^He shifts awkwardly. Seems like he isn't great with comforting people.
^It tastes like bittersweet metal. Mostly bitter. And it burns.
^You try to tough it out, but your face contorts, somewhat unsettlingly.
^"What's that stuff? Seems gnarly, if your face is anything to go by!"
^You only manage a few weak coughs in response.
^This only seems to pique his curiosity further, and he slowly approaches you.
^"You mind if I have a taste?"
^Try as you might, you can't get the words out, and he seems to take this as a sign of approval.
^He takes the poison from your weak grip and downs the rest of the bottle!
^"Whuh, what's in this stuff?" he manages to say between coughs.
^He stumbles backwards, clutching his stomach. And then he keels over.
^Victory? You suppose? Definitely what you intended to happen!
^Right. You brewed this thing yourself, and you know it would burn the whole way down, destroying tissue as it goes.
^Rudibert is stunned at your audacity for a few seconds, then he regains his composure.
^"Well I... I suppose? Could we maybe add some mus-"
^You and Rudibert eventually finish the soup. No firewood nearby meant that you had to have it cold, but Rudibert didn't seem to mind.

c-14: ^Eh. Tastes like nothing. Kind of cold.

b: ^Even Rudibert seems disinterested in the snowball.

c-18: ^Try as you might, you can't come up with anything helpful.

b: ^Wisps of healing energy coil around you, closing your wounds as they make their way from bottom to top.
^Wisps of healing energy coil around you, closing your wounds as they make their way from bottom to top.
^Wisps of healing energy coil around you, but they can't find anything to heal.
^Though you're supposed to be fighting, Rudibert seems too mesmerized by the healing wisps to exploit the opportunity!
^He quickly shakes off his amazement as the spell's visual effects wane.
^Rudibert seems thoroughly mesmerized by the healing wisps, his gaze following the energy as it moves.
^He seems suspicious of your offer, and swats it away!
^"I'm not falling for your tricks anymore!"
^At least he didn't cut you up with the sword!
^He seems hesitant for a moment, but he does accept your offer!
^He tosses the apple in his mouth and swallows it whole.
^"You wanna have some marshmallows? They're super delicious!"
^A roaring bonfire appears before you as you cast the spell.
^You eventually finish the marshmallows with Rudibert. Though you did have to explain "marshmallows" to him first.
^"Those were... Really, really delicious. Almost as good as my mushrooms!"
^You've successfully taught this frog the wonders of marshmallows! A roaring success!
^"That took a while though. I should probably hop home."
^You may or may not have thought that he lives in the cave.
^"Sounds good. I should keep going as well."
^He hops off after that, leaving you by yourself.
^You cast the spell, and a bonfire appears before Rudibert! He flinches for a second, before recovering.
^Wait, it was supposed to appear on him! What's going on?
^You take out some marshmallows to ease his mind, hoping to prove that you didn't plan to roast him.
^Wait. You did plan to roast him! What the hell?
^"You wanna have some marshmallows? They're super delicious!"
^You'll have to figure this out later, it seems.
^You eventually finish the marshmallows with Rudibert. Though you did have to explain "marshmallows" to him first.
^"Those were... Really, really delicious. Almost as good as my mushrooms!"
^You've successfully taught this frog the wonders of marshmallows! A roaring... success?
^"That took a while though. I should probably hop home."
^You may or may not have thought that he lives in the cave.
^"Sounds good. I should keep going as well."
^He hops off after that, leaving you wondering what went wrong. Or right? You can't tell anymore.
^He doesn't seem to approve of small-talk in the middle of a fight.
^"Very perceptive of you! That's one of the reasons I like this place so much!"
^He seems genuinely happy that you brought up the subject. Nice one!

c-23: ^"What... am I meant to do with this? Thanks I guess?"
c-24: ^You swing at Rudibert, landing a blow directly on his forehead!

b: ^He collapses to the ground, motionless. You've won this fight!
^He shakes his head as he stumbles backwards. Seems your strike did some damage!

c-25: ^You land some solid strikes, each leaving a painful-looking wound!

b: ^He seems to succumb to his wounds, and collapses to the ground. You've won.
^He squeaks loudly, hopping backwards as he does. Seems you've dealt him a serious blow!

c-26: ^You lunge at Rudibert, and land a solid blow directly on the top of his head!
^He collapses almost instantly, being knocked out by the force of your attack!
^You've won, all thanks to your trusty frying pan! You give it a few pats to show appreciation.

b: ^"Hah, I'm not falling for such an obvious trick!"
^"I'm not really injured right now, but thanks, I guess?"
^He collapses to the ground, motionless. Seems you take the win!
^He shakes his head slightly, seemingly taking some damage!

c-29: ^You inch closer to Rudibert, and unleash a devastatic static shock directly on his snout!

b: ^He collapses to the ground, motionless. Seems you've won!
^He flinches back violently, clearly surprised by your devious attack!

c-30: ^A single tear forms below Rudibert's eye.
^He seems genuinely heartbroken. Inconsolable. Beyond any comforting.
^He starts hopping away with tears streaming from his eyes!
^"Rudibert I-", you start, but he just hops away faster.
^Your gut wrenches. What have you done?
c-31: ^He starts to slowly try to untangle himself, but you wrap the rest of the rope around him before he can get free.
^"Okay okay, I give up. Now what?"
^"Now uh. You're going to sit here and uh... I didn't really think things this far. I'll just go."
^"Eh. Sounds fair enough I guess. Could you toss me that mushroom on your way out?"
^Far be it for you to get between a frog and his mushroom-habit.
^You knock the mushroom towards him as you start to leave.
^"Hm. I don't think I can actually eat it with my hands tied. Could you..." His voice fades as you walk away.

b: ^"Nice try, but I'm not about to fall for such a cheap trick!"
^"What's this stuff? Seems super gnarly by the looks of the bottle!"
^"Oh it is! Way better than the mushrooms in here too. Gets you totally gone!"
^"Sounds totally crazy... Maybe I'll give it a shot."
^He takes the offered bottle, and downs the whole thing!
^"Whuh, what's in this stuff?" he manages to say between coughs.
^He stumbles backwards, clutching his stomach. And then he keels over.
^You place the can in your bag, and quickly swing it at Rudibert, landing a blow directly on his forehead!
^He collapses to the ground, motionless. Seems you take the win!
^He shakes his head slightly, seemingly taking some damage!
^He grabs the can and stows it under his hat. Good deed done?

c-34: ^It lands on his stomach, sending snow flying!
^He scowls at you for a moment before relaxing. Seems he didn't consider that to be aggressive, at least.
c-35: ^He's left in the dust, seemingly having lost his sense of direction in the cloud! Nice!
c-36: ^You swing the stick at Rudibert's head, and land a blow!

b: ^He collapses to the ground, motionless. Seems you've won!
^He flinches back violently, probably surprised that such a cool stick is capable of such violence!
^"Hah, sounds too good to be true!"
^He says that, but his pupils got huge for a second there. How easy.
^"I'm being serious! I know we're fighting and all, but I wouldn't lie about this!"
^He relaxes for a moment. Suspicion slowly fades from his face, being replaced with excitement. One last push.
^"I'm not, there were like at least a hundred of them too!"
^"Whoa... A hundred... Maybe... Maybe I'll go check it out after all..."
^. If there's really mushrooms there I might even forgive you!"
^"Uh huh, saw it myself on the way here!"
^"Whoa... I think I'll go check it out! I could use a few more for my stash."

c-37: ^He starts hopping away. Hook, line, and sinker. Nice.

b: ^Rudibert braces for a moment, and keeps bracing, and... he's very surprised that the spell isn't hurting him.
^"Whoa, what's this? It's not hurting me?"
^"No, it's a healing spell. Sorry about attacking you."
^His wounds eventually finish closing up, and he seems to relax.
^"Hm. Maybe you're not a bad person after all. Still, I'm gonna hop home now. I don't trust you just yet."
^He does as he says, and hops out of the cave. Hopefully you can mend this relationship some day.
^He's mesmerized by the healing wisps encircling him. Though there doesn't seem to be anything to heal.

FROG_COUNTER_ATTACK: ^His expression shifts to anger, and he seems to be planning something.
^You have no time to predict his actions before he launches his tongue directly at you!
^It hurts worse than some punches you've taken, and you cough up some
FROG_OPPORTUNITY_ATTACK: ^Rudibert senses an opportunity to strike, and takes his chance!
^He leaps forward, sword in hand, and strikes

b: ^As you're making your way out of the cave, you come across some cards!
^Since you're in a hurry, you quickly pick up what you can and keep going.
^You've solved the mystery of the cave, so you figure you're done here. Time to keep going.
^As you're making your leave, you spot some cards on the ground!
^You pick out the intact ones, not bothering with the rest.
^After you're done taking in your victory, you give the cave a quick once-over before leaving.
^Good thing you did, as you spot a few cards on the ground near Rudibert!
^You pick out the intact ones, not bothering with the rest.

FROG_EVENT_EPILOGUE: ^You eventually make your way out of the cave, and need to take a moment to let your eyes adjust to the light.
